homepage.text_excerpt:
Homepage - Neuron Soundware
Menu
Menu
Contact us
→ LOGIN
AI, IoT and Edge Computing for Industrial Optimization
Neuron Soundware maximizes the performance of industrial processes through data processing, predictive analytics and quality control applications.
CONTACT US
What we do
Discover AI-powered cutting-edge brainware which can give you unparalleled  advantages
Neuron Soundware believes in challenging the status quo in manufacturing.  Via a different approach and way of thinking, we can place you apart from your competition. By using Artificial Intelligence and  Machine Learning in combination with the analysis of sound and other physical parameters, you will gain the advantage of state-of-the-art solutions for the monitoring and control of your machines and manufacturing processes.
Our Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning algorithms will maximize the  performance of  your equipment and processes
The algorithms analyze various physical parameters of your machinery, such as sound, temperature, pressure, electric current, magnetic field, luminescence, permeability, irradiance, and many others, to provide information about the current health and behaviour of individual machines, and processes.
If a machine exists, it can be monitored
Neuron Soundware's  technology can be applied to an extensive range of machines, from power generating equipment, pumps, compressors, mills, and various transport systems to
CNC machines, complex HVAC systems, robots, welding, and 3D printing machines, amongst many others. It can monitor and control a single piece of equipment, or an entire fleet of machines, or a complete production line.
Take advantage of Neuron Soundware’s significant expertise as applied to R&D in technology, process  and product development
Partnering with Neuron Soundware in R&D offers substantial benefits to OEMs including the reduction
of the costs and risks associated with R&D, as well as security and confidentiality, fast track developments, patentable innovations, valuable intellectual properties, and more.
Work with an internationally acclaimed company
Neuron Soundware is internationally acclaimed as an unparalleled innovator in the field of the Internet of Things (IoT), and in the application of
Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) to process control and predictive maintenance in manufacturing and processing plants.
We are agents of change
We inspire our customers  to achieve higher, better
Unique challenges and solutions
We have a reputation for exceptional skills and creativity in the development of AI and ML-based value-added solutions for our customers, solving the most challenging problems in maximizing equipment utilization and process supervision.
Highest possible value
Unlike other operating and predictive maintenance solutions, Neuron Soundware delivers a real-time (24/7) continuous monitoring solution based on IoT hardware, and AI and ML data processing. Ease of installation makes it possible to launc

About us - Neuron Soundware
Menu
Menu
Contact us
→ LOGIN
We are shaping the future of machine performance
7 years of development |
6 international awards |
4 continents
CONTACT US
We are a company of innovators at the frontier of new technologies and products
From an awarded startup to a recognized global expert in AI and ML based solutions
company history
Predictive Maintenance
The company was founded in 2016 by Pavel Konečný through the StartupYard accelerator. That same year, the project  combining IoT and AI won the Idea of the Year international  award. The concept developed into its present form, achieving the goals of preventing unscheduled production shutdowns, boosting productivity, speeding-up timely intervention, providing real-time diagnostics, while achieving energy and repair cost savings. The goals of extending your machinery lifecycles through real-time failure detection and optimizing machinery maintenance plans have materialised.
CEO & Founder
Pavel Konečný
“I had been waiting for computers to be powerful enough to be used effectively for the development of artificial intelligence.”
Pavel Konečný is a tech visionary, speaker and founder of Czech AI and IoT startup Neuron Soundware.
He started his career at Accenture, a leading IT consultancy firm, where he took part in 35+ technology and strategy projects for 25 clients on 3 continents over 11 years.
He moved into entrepreneurship in 2016 when he founded the company Neuron Soundware, with a focus on predictive machine maintenance using sound analysis.
Meet our Team
Our journey has lead us from an AI startup to experts in AI and ML based solutions
Pavel Trojánek
SVP Sales & Marketing
Petra Vecajova
Operations Manager
Jan Tožička
Head of Machine Learning team
